```{python}
#| include: false
import yaml

# Load resume data
with open('/Users/shakes/DevProjects/jobsearch/templates/resume/data/resume-data.yml', 'r') as f:
    resume_data = yaml.safe_load(f)

personal = resume_data['personal']
experience = resume_data['experience']
education = resume_data['education']
skills = resume_data['skills']
```

# `{python} personal['firstname']` `{python} personal['lastname']`
## `{python} personal['positions'][0]`

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Contact Information**
- 📧 `{python} personal['email']`
- 📱 `{python} personal['phone']`
- 📍 `{python} personal['address']`
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Professional Links**
- 🔗 [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/`{python} personal['linkedin']`)
- 💻 [GitHub](https://github.com/`{python} personal['github']`)
:::
::::

---

## Professional Summary

`{python} resume_data['summary']['default']`

---

## Experience

```{python}
#| output: asis
for exp in experience:
    print(f"### {exp['title']}")
    print(f"**{exp['company']}** | {exp['location']} | {exp['date']}")
    print()
    
    for bullet in exp['bullets']:
        print(f"- {bullet['text']}")
    print()
```

---

## Education

```{python}
#| output: asis
for edu in education:
    print(f"### {edu['degree']}")
    print(f"**{edu['school']}** | {edu['location']} | {edu['date']}")
    
    if 'notes' in edu:
        for note in edu['notes']:
            print(f"- {note}")
    print()
```

---

## Technical Skills

```{python}
#| output: asis
for category, skill_list in skills.items():
    category_name = category.replace('_', ' ').title()
    skills_str = ', '.join(skill_list)
    print(f"**{category_name}:** {skills_str}")
    print()
```
